simple_types.name: PERM_DMA_Field
simple_types.code:
type PERM_DMA_Field is
   NoDMA,
   NoSeparateAttribute,
   SeparateAttribute)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: NoDMA
enumeration_literals.description:
Peripheral has DMA and DMA transfers always have the same security
attribute as assigned to the peripheral

enumeration_literals.name: NoSeparateAttribute
enumeration_literals.description:
Peripheral has DMA and DMA transfers can have a different security
attribute than the one assigned to the peripheral

enumeration_literals.name: NonSecure

simple_types.name: PERM_SECUREMAPPING_Field
simple_types.code:
type PERM_SECUREMAPPING_Field is
   NonSecure,
   Secure,
   UserSelectable,
   Split)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: NonSecure
enumeration_literals.description: This peripheral is always accessible as a secure peripheral

enumeration_literals.name: Secure
enumeration_literals.description:
Non-secure or secure attribute for this peripheral is defined by the
PERIPH[n].PERM register

enumeration_literals.name: UserSelectable
enumeration_literals.description: This peripheral implements the split security mechanism.
